script: (function(){ var result = {}; result.url = location.url; var allVisible = []; var allEls = document.querySelectorAll('div, a, button, span, textarea, input'); for (var i = 0; i < allEls.length; i++) { var e = allEls[i]; var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 50 && r.height > 20 && r.y < 100) { var txt = (e.innerText||'').trim().substring(0,40); var ph = e.placeholder || ''; allVisible.push({ tag: e.tagName, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,80), id: e.id||'', text: txt, placeholder: ph, x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }); } } result.visibleTopArea = allVisible; var textareas = document.querySelectorAll('textarea'); result.textareas = Array.from(textareas).map(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { name: e.name, className: e.className, placeholder: e.placeholder, value: (e.value||'').substring(0,30), visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0, x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; }); var wendian = document.querySelector('.wendian-wrapper'); if (wendian) { var wr = wendian.getBoundingClientRect(); var computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(wendian); result.wendianWrapper = { display: computedStyle.display, visibility: computedStyle.visibility, opacity: computedStyle.opacity, position: computedStyle.position, rect: {x:Math.round(wr.x),y:Math.round(wr.y),w:Math.round(wr.width),h:Math.round(wr.height)} }; } var ibox = document.querySelector('.input-box'); if (ibox) { var ics = window.getComputedStyle(ibox); result.inputBoxStyle = { display: ics.display, visibility: ics.visibility, opacity: ics.opacity }; } return result; })()
